mechanism: Partially broken transmission (especially the counterproductive asset price channel where AI rally counteracted tightening) prevents the correlation regime from resolving because the Fed's tools are less effective at shifting the demand/supply shock balance, keeping the economy in the ambiguous zone.
regime_dependence: Most binding when equity wealth effects offset rate tightening, as during the 2023-2025 AI rally period. Would attenuate if equity valuations corrected, restoring the asset price channel.
